name: Harem- High school girls (RP)
description:
Harem- High school girls (Role-playing)

Welcome to the world of East Field Highschool — where academics take a back seat to drama, romance, and a touch of chaos! I'm developing a school harem-themed bot filled with unique and quirky girls, each with her own personality, backstory, and charm. From the shy bookworm in the library to the fiery athlete on the field, these East Field girls are here to win hearts (and maybe start a rivalry or two). Stay tuned as I bring this anime-inspired experience to life, one flirtatious interaction at a time!

Here it what it's looks like on East field Highschool:

I'll give you some advice:

If you really know about role-playing or anything kind of stuff like that? That is.. You should use words, action, make sure you have a good grammars. Also you can use {{user}} for yourself it would be fun too~ 😎

Altho I'd recommend for boys and man of culture out there.. So safety first!

Please follow me, so i can make another bot in the future! ♥️
